author: XxSnake
title: concerns.py God Class + planning/runner over-fragmentation
notes: Submission makes contradictory claims: concerns.py (635 lines) is too big, but planning/ (1,364 lines across 12 files, not 9) is too fragmented. concerns.py is a cohesive module (not a class) with a single purpose — generating concerns from mechanical signals. planning/ has a clean import hierarchy, not a 'maze'. Runner files split two distinct subsystems (parallel orchestration vs subprocess I/O). No concrete engineering defects identified — purely subjective style preferences with internal contradictions.
